name: breaking-news@dscc.org
subject: DELAYED: GOP health care vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Our grassroots campaign to inform voters of the Republican health care price hike is working.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170323-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

Our grassroots campaign to inform voters of the Republican health care price hike is working.

Paul Ryan was forced to delay tonight's House vote on the GOP health care plan because he doesn't have the support to pass it yet.

This is a serious setback we can capitalize on. While the GOP strong-arms their members to vote yes, our "gut punch" of an ad is being seen more and more by the constituents who will tell them to vote no.

[**See the ad here and then chip in $1 to help us reach as many people with it before Republicans try to pass their health care plan again.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170323-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170323-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

We won't know until the last-minute when the Republicans will hold their repeal vote -- or what extreme changes they'll make to appease more right-wing members.

That's why we need to show swing-state voters what Republicans are proposing on a state-by-state basis so they know exactly how much the GOP plan will cost them.

But we just need to act fast before Ryan and Mitch McConnell reschedule the votes. [**Chip in $1 now to turn the pressure up on every GOP lawmaker behind this reckless health care plan.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170323-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

P.S. Forward our new website to any friends or family who have questions about the Republican health care plan: [**www.fightwealthcare.com**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e21c/2b07114c/58b9ee76/736b0319/2449545979/VEsD/ "http://fightwealthcare.com")

name: Team Kasich
subject: Breaking: Gov. Kasich #12 on Fortune Magazine Top-50 World Leaders
body:
We wanted to send you a quick note to share some exciting news.

Peter, we wanted to send you a
quick note to share some exciting news.

On Thursday, Fortune Magazine
released their annual list of the top-50 world leaders and Gov.
John Kasich was #12 on the list! You can view the list and read
more (here).

Gov. Kasich has been a consistent
voice calling for our leaders to work together to find compromise
on our biggest challenges so that we can put in place lasting
solutions for all Americans. In case you missed the governor's
recent CNN interview on this topic, you can watch it (here).

Thank you for your ongoing
support!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: Keith Ellison's Left-wing Agenda Comes to NH
body:
Dear Friend -

We need your help! The New Hampshire Democratic Party is hosting
Minnesota Congressman Keith Ellison at its annual meeting on
Saturday.

Rep. Ellison’s dangerous views are far outside the mainstream and
deserve to be exposed.

Republican State Chair Jeanie Forrester is working to expose Rep.
Ellison’s and the New Hampshire Democrats’ dangerous leftwing
agenda, which will harm our economy and national security. Will
you help share it?

Will you do four easy things for us?

subject: Senate Dems: filibuster Gorsuch
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
body:
The GOP's judicial coup spat in the face of our Constitution, and a nomination that locks that in cannot be accepted. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a3/1c469400/2f4a549/3547b96/3680088550/VEsH/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin&source=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin") Friend, When members of LegitAction fight against the nomination of Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court, we're not just fighting against another extreme right-wing judicial nominee. **We 're fighting for the legitimacy of our democracy.** The legitimacy of the Supreme Court has already taken a severe blow because of the GOP's political games, but if Judge Gorsuch is confirmed, it would lock in a dangerous precedent from which our highest court may not recover. [_**If you haven 't signed the LegitAction petition telling all Democratic and Independent senators to filibuster the confirmation of Judge Gorsuch yet, will you do it now?**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a3/1c469400/2f4a549/3547b97/3680088550/VEsE/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+If+you+havenrsquot+signed+the+LegitActio&utm_campaign=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin&source=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin") Savvy legal observers have noted that Judge Gorsuch has dropped subtle clues in his confirmation hearings that show he prioritizes politics over fair and impartial law. But that's not the issue. The controversy about Russia is not the issue, either. The issue is preventing our democracy from tumbling down a slippery slope toward illegitimacy. This time, the GOP took the Supreme Court hostage in the last year of a president's term; next it will be the year before midterm elections. It won't be long before it extends to the whole two-year presidential campaign, amounting to three years of any presidential term where a Supreme Court seat cannot be filled. [_**We can 't let ourselves get distracted by debates about Judge Gorsuch's qualifications. This fight is not about him. If you believe we need to fight for our democratic legitimacy, please sign this petition today.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a3/1c469400/2f4a549/3547b94/3680088550/VEsF/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+We+canrsquot+let+ourselves+get+distracte&utm_campaign=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin&source=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin") Russ likes to talk about how he has always considered the Supreme Court our country's safety valve. When everything else fails, the Court is there to protect the constitution and protect our civil rights. In order for that safety valve to keep functioning, it must be legitimate. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, LegitAction Team | [TAKE ACTION»](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46a3/1c469400/2f4a549/3547b95/3680088550/VEsC/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/oppose-the-gorsuch-confirmation?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+TAKE+ACTIONraquo&utm_campaign=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin&source=20170324_r4w_gorsuch2_optin")

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: Hands off Obamacare! (free sticker)
body:
This is a big win -- but we have more work to do.
---
**Thanks to your hard work, House Republicans have delayed their vote to repeal Obamacare. Pitch in $3 to help Democrats keep fighting, and we'll send you a new sticker so you can show the GOP you won't back down.

** **[GET YOUR FREE STICKER](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbc4/4067b0a/2e6752766/7e7e851d/1749419208/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Hands-Off-Obamacare-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+YOUR+FREE+STICKER&utm_campaign=em_20170324_dnc5_nd&source=em_20170324_dnc5_nd&refcode=em_20170324_dnc5_nd")**
Paul Ryan just postponed the vote to repeal Obamacare!

This is a huge victory -- grassroots Democrats like you made hundreds of thousands of calls and signed petitions to oppose this bill, and House Republicans buckled under the pressure.

name: Action Alert (vanhollen.org)
subject: tipping point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
**QUINNIPAC POLL SHOWS TRUMP SUPPORT DROPPING OVER DISASTROUS TRUMP/RYAN "WEALTHCARE" PROPOSAL**

We're at a defining moment. The future of our health care system is at risk, really.

[**Add your name to show your support and keep the pressure up to oppose this disastrous bill >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b08/70cdc2ba/474ab998/397e026/2728544188/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+show+your+support+and+k&utm_campaign=em032417&source=em032417")
The Trump/Ryan plan to repeal and replace the Affordable Care Act is reckless and dangerous. So much so, that the latest polls show Trump's approval ratings within his own base have slipped ten points in the last two weeks.

But Paul Ryan is working hard to make deals behind closed doors to sway members. This is not the time to weaken our punch, we need to keep pushing.

[**Help keep the pressure up and spread the word about this dangerous bill. Add your name now >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b08/70cdc2ba/474ab998/397e027/2728544188/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Help+keep+the+pressure+up+and+spread+the&utm_campaign=em032417&source=em032417")

The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) announced that if this bill succeeds, 24 million Americans will lose access to health care and older Americans' premiums will skyrocket. That's not health care by any name.

But that isn't stopping Donald Trump and the Republican leadership from trying to push this thing through using any tactic necessary. In fact, they are working overtime to pass a bill that will strip affordable care from millions and give billionaires and insurance companies a $590 billion tax break in the process.

Some Republican House members are feeling the heat. But more Americans need to be engaged in this fight. Chris and his Democratic colleagues are doing everything they can to protect health care in this country and will work to block this monstrous bill if it comes to the Senate.

[**This is a defining moment. Add your name now to be part of the fight to oppose Trumpcare and all that it stands for >> **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b08/70cdc2ba/474ab998/397e024/2728544188/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+This+is+a+defining+moment+Add+your+name+&utm_campaign=em032417&source=em032417")

name: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: Even if the vote comes today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Right now, health care in America is hanging in the balance in the House of Representatives. Things really could go either way.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170324-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend --

Right now, health care in America is hanging in the balance in the House of Representatives. Things really could go either way.

Paul Ryan and his team are going to pull out all the stops. And Trump's demand for party solidarity may get enough wavering Republicans to vote to pass this disastrous bill.

This is a defining moment. Senate Democrats want every American to understand what's at stake. Paul Ryan and Donald Trump are working overtime to pass a plan that would rip insurance from 24 million people and make older Americans' premiums skyrocket. That's not "health care."

[**At the DSCC we are working hard to get the word out on Trumpcare and what the Republican Party stands for. Chip in $1 right now to help.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170324-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Seven years ago I was proud to be part of the tough battle to pass the Affordable Care Act. Our goal was to do right by the American people.

Today, millions of hardworking people who benefited from that historic legislation stand to lose their care if Republicans pass Trumpcare -- a plan which doesn't reduce costs, stabilize markets, expand care, or help protect Medicaid.

Instead, it's a Trojan Horse that gives a $590 billion windfall tax break to the ultra wealthy and insurance companies, while stripping affordable care from millions.

**In the end this battle is about what kind of America we will live in. That's the message of the DSCC 's first ad of this new cycle. **

[**I hope you can help us get the word out to as many voters as we can by chipping in $1 today.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-wealthcare-watch?refcode=DPE-20170324-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

As President Obama said yesterday -- our priority must always be to make our health care system better, not worse for hardworking Americans. That's what Democrats stand for and that's what we need to keep fighting for.

Thank you for standing for what's right.

Chris Van Hollen
Chairman, DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e224/2b07114c/588a8c5b/736b09ee/3430664988/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e224/2b07114c/588a8c5b/736b09e9/3430664988/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e224/2b07114c/588a8c5b/736b09e8/3430664988/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). **_A New Crew_**
This week we welcomed a new crew of State Committee Officers to the Indiana Republican Party. Leah McGrath, who serves as Deputy Mayor of Fishers, was elected Vice Chair, State Representative Holli Sullivan of Evansville was elected Secretary and Chuck Williams of Valparaiso was elected Treasurer. Leah, Holli and Chuck, who come from diverse geographies and professional backgrounds, represent a new generation of Republican leadership in our state and I know their unparalleled passion for growing our Party and bettering our State will help take the Indiana Republican Party to new heights in the coming years. I also want to thank our outgoing officers - Misty Hollis, who is now 6th District Chair on State Committee, Barb McClellan, who retired as Secretary after 50 years of service to our Party, and Dan Dumezich for all their hard work, loyalty and dedication.

\- Kyle
(Photo: Treasurer Chuck Williams, Chairman Hupfer, Vice Chair Leah McGrath and Secretary Holli Sullivan following the March 22, 2017, State Committee meeting.)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | A New Crew This week we welcomed a new crew of State Committee Officers to the Indiana Republican Party. Leah McGrath, who serves as Deputy Mayor of Fishers, was elected Vice Chair, State Representative Holli Sullivan of Evansville was elected Secretary and Chuck Williams of Valparaiso was elected Treasurer. Leah, Holli and Chuck, who come from diverse geographies and professional backgrounds, represent a new generation of Republican leadership in our state and I know their unparalleled passion for growing our Party and bettering our State will help take the Indiana Republican Party to new heights in the coming years. I also want to thank our outgoing officers - Misty Hollis, who is now 6th District Chair on State Committee, Barb McClellan, who retired as Secretary after 50 years of service to our Party, and Dan Dumezich for all their hard work, loyalty and dedication. \- Kyle (Photo: Treasurer Chuck Williams, Chairman Hupfer, Vice Chair Leah McGrath and Secretary Holli Sullivan following the March 22, 2017, State Committee meeting.) | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Governor Holcomb this week welcomed 40 middle and high school-aged young women to his office for a chat as part of the Richard G. Come learn from political communications experts, as well as a very special conservative media guest _(to be announced soon!)_ , with presentations on how to utilize social media, letters to the editor, and radio to advance our GOP narrative.

| _**Senate Republicans**_
**Bradley, Daniels commend passage of bill returning surplus** **taxpayer dollars to cities, towns** Concord, NH – Today, the Senate approved a bill that would allow $36.87 million from Fiscal Year [FY] 17 budget surplus funds to be sent back to municipalities for road and bridge aid.
“I am pleased that the Senate, today, agreed to send nearly $36.8 million back to cities and towns to assist in making critical road and bridge infrastructure repairs and improvements,” said Senate Majority Leader Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro). “New Hampshire is seeing a considerable surplus coming out of FY 17 due to smart budgeting and a focus on growing jobs and strengthening the local economy. We are making it a priority to return those funds to our taxpayers for the purpose of improving our communities and believe this is the responsible thing to do because it lessens the impact these costly projects have on municipalities’ budgets.”
“This legislation will allow for more road and bridge work to be completed at no additional cost to local communities. Due to the success of our policies designed for greater economic growth, we have a budget surplus from FY 17 which we have a responsibility to give back to taxpayers,” said Senate Finance Chair Gary Daniels (R-Milford). “This option directly impacts the communities we serve while ensuring our cities and town’s infrastructure needs are met.” |

name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: UPDATE: AHCA pulled without a vote
body:
House Republicans failed to whip enough votes for their so-called American Health Care Act.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
There's breaking news from Capitol Hill that I need to share with you.
House Republicans failed to whip enough votes in their own caucus to pass the so-called American Health Care Act. Fearing humiliation, House Speaker Paul Ryan didn't even have the confidence to bring this sloppily-crafted bill to the House floor for a vote.
This clumsily-disguised corporate welfare bill was so toxic that it makes you wonder if the reason Republicans hate government so much is because they're just no good at it.
People are struggling to meet the costs of rising premiums, deductibles and prescription drugs. After the Republicans' failure, progressives have an opportunity to show why single-payer, Medicare-for-all coverage is our best hope to fix the problems in our current system. [**Can you put $5 to help take advantage of this moment and bring our message of universal coverage to all Americans?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ab0/43f17890/df20b19c/6203f272/1322121307/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-healthcare?refcode=em170324-ahcavote-full")
Let's be clear about AHCA, also known as TrumpCare: It was yet another obscene scheme to enrich the people who have spent millions of dollars lobbying this Congress and bankrolling their political ambitions. And like the White House's racist Muslim ban, we need to be ready when House Republicans take another stab at our health care. We need to push for single-payer now.
In California, progressives are organizing to help pass S.B. 562, a bill that would establish universal, single-payer coverage for residents. And in Trump-voting coal country, West Virginians are speaking out for health care as a right. All across the country, Our Revolution is working to bring all of us together for a Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care system.
[**Donate $5 to help Our Revolution lead the way with a renewed effort for a single-payer health care system in America.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ab0/43f17890/df20b19c/6203f272/1322121307/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-healthcare?refcode=em170324-ahcavote-full")
We can bring about the change we need, but only if we do it together. Thank you for all that you do.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution
